name: Pumble
one_liner: Pumble is a team chat and collaboration tool that provides unlimited message history and team communication features.
access_notes: API access is available on all plans. Developers can install the API addon and generate keys via the Pumble workspace interface themselves.

evidence.claim: The Pumble API is available on all plans and allows interaction via API keys generated after installing the API addon.
The Pumble API is publicly available for anyone to explore, and documentation is provided.
Search citation: Pumble vs Slack: Which Team Chat Tool Actually Fits Your Team?
Search citation: Pumble AI Assistant - Connect Your Apps with Pumble

mcp_notes: No official or well-known community Model Context Protocol (MCP) server was found. Pumble provides standard REST API documentation via Swagger.
auth_notes: Authentication is performed by generating an API key via the API addon within the Pumble workspace. The key is used in HTTP requests and for authorization in Swagger documentation.
api_notes: The API is primarily focused on messaging operations (sending messages, reactions, replies, deletions, and listing channels/messages). It does not expose the entire product functionality.
